creator: joe@tao.org.uk
text:
On Sun, Dec 30, 2001 at 03:29:44PM -0800, sin wrote:
> how can i use my usb audio device when kernel detects it but i don't
> know any way to link it with /dev/dsp. When i tryed to compile
> kernel there is not any suport for usb audio device or uaudio.h. i
> think he detect my usb device, but he don't know what do to with
> it. Help !!!!!!!!!!!!!!

NetBSD has a uaudio (usb audio) device in their usb stack, but it's not
been ported to FreeBSD yet.  You'll have to wait until it has been or
submit patches.

Joe
